creator: f.roman.f+bsdbugs@gmail.com
text:
Developer removed commercial restrictions, now Dansguardian is free. You can check this at the news section of Dansguardian's web (http://dansguardian.org/index.php?page=news):
"Free as in beer 	Wed 27 May 2015

All cost for commercial use has been abolished.
- Daniel Barron - DansGuardian website Maintainer"

Could anybody "undelete" the port? Thanks!
